scripts.setup: cp .env.example .env && docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/var/www/html -w /var/www/html laravelsail/php84-composer:latest composer install --ignore-platform-reqs && npm install && docker compose up -d && sleep 10 && docker compose exec laravel.test php artisan key:generate && docker compose exec laravel.test php artisan migrate && docker compose exec laravel.test php artisan storage:link && npm run build
scripts.migrate: docker compose exec laravel.test php artisan migrate
